settings.featured_tags_help: Selected categories appear highlighted with a star badge on the homepage and categories page.
settings.auth_image_help: Background image shown in the right panel of the login, sign up, and forgot password modals.
settings.banner_image_help: Upload the hero banner image displayed at the top of the forum.
settings.show_auth_buttons_label: Show Login / Sign Up buttons in header for guests
settings.show_auth_buttons_help: Display Log In and Sign Up pill buttons in the header secondary nav for guests.
settings.hero_image_position_help: CSS background-position value, e.g. 'center top' or '50% 20%'.
settings.search_v1_help: Show the inline search dropdown instead of the V2 modal.
settings.show_share_help: Add a Share action button to each post.
settings.show_action_icons_label: Show icons on Like and Reply buttons
settings.show_action_icons_help: Display Font Awesome icons on the Like and Reply action buttons.
settings.fixed_avatar_effect_help: Keep the post avatar sticky while reading long comments on desktop.
settings.logo_svg_help: Upload a custom SVG logo for your forum.
settings.logo_enabled_help: Display the custom logo in the header.
settings.show_online_users_help: Display the number of currently online users.
settings.show_guest_cta_help: Display a call-to-action message for guests.
settings.custom_default_avatar_help: Upload a custom default avatar image for users without an avatar.

footer_settings.footer_company_description_placeholder: Brief description about your company or forum...
footer_settings.footer_links_help_json: Configure the footer link columns in JSON format. Each column should have a title and a list of links with label and url.
footer_settings.footer_social_help_json: Configure social media links in JSON format. Use keys: facebook, twitter, linkedin, instagram, youtube.

home.start_discussion: Tell everyone what are you working on...
